info.title: ChatBot API
info.description: ChatBot API allows you to manage chatbot stories, users, and access conversation reports. Stories are conversation scenarios between customers and the bot. Users represent the people who chat with the bot.

get.description: Returns a list of all stories on your account.

post.description: Creates a new ChatBot story on your account.
Adds one or more segments to User.

delete.description: Removes one or more segments from User.

put.description: Marks User as banned or unbanned.

banned.description: Whether to ban or unban the user

post.description: Streams CSV rows of user data.

get.description: Returns list of conversation data points.
Returns list of paid conversation data points.
Returns list of conversation message data points.
Returns list of average conversation data points.
Returns list of interactions with usage data.

userId.description: User ID (not required when default_email is provided)

segments.description: Segment ID or array of segment IDs

users.description: List of user IDs (max 1000). Not allowed with filters/match.
